summary: Excellent early‑70 soundboard capture of a strong set featuring Cosmic Charlie, Mason’s Children and a beautiful Dire Wolf.
review: The reviewers agree this is an outstanding early‑1970 show – not the band’s absolute best that year but certainly one of the finest up to that point. Standout performances include Cosmic Charlie, Mason’s Children and a gorgeous rendition of Dire Wolf, with solid overall tape quality despite a few minor cuts.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑5 star reviews highlight strong musical performance and generally good soundboard recording with only minor tape issues.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Minor tape cuts noted, but overall solid and listenable sound; no major mix problems reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows well with strong renditions of Workingman's material and highlights that keep the energy high throughout.
